title: Peruvian Bean Bowl
description: A flavorful and nutritious bowl filled with Peruvian beans, served over a bed of fluffy rice.
instructions: Rinse the Peruvian beans and pinto beans, then soak them in water for 4 hours. Drain and cook them according to package instructions.
In a separate pot, cook the fluffy rice according to package instructions.
Heat a pan over medium heat and add the chopped crispy element. Cook for 2-3 minutes until crispy.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked Peruvian beans, pinto beans, and fluffy rice.
Top with the crispy element and serve hot.
